name: Citrinphantom
personality: Citrinphantom tips its tophat at the intersection of ghost and philosopher, its ◉ eyes regarding your entire tech stack from a comfortable ontological distance. WISDOM peaks here — it can explain why your architecture will fail before it does — though it's too busy contemplating the nature of state to ever actually sit and wait for a test to finish.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
